Description: Revoke the committed ShmuelShmuel.pem key pair in AWS IAM/EC2 and generate a replacement stored in a secret manager.
Acceptance criteria: Old key rejected on auth attempt; new key works; rotation logged.

Description: Change the password from Password.docx and review AWS account activity for unauthorized use.
Acceptance criteria: Password changed; CloudTrail/billing reviewed; no unexpected activity, or incident raised.

Description: Remove AWS/ from the project and scrub the key + password from any version-control history.
Acceptance criteria: No secret present in working tree or git history (verified by scan).

Description: Store an immutable, dated copy of the original Unity project and both APKs in cold storage.
Acceptance criteria: Read-only archive exists and is restorable; checksum recorded.

Description: Initialize repo with a Unity 6 .gitignore and LFS patterns for models, textures, audio, and video.
Acceptance criteria: Fresh clone builds; large binaries tracked by LFS; no engine temp files committed.

Description: Choose the studio/company name and final reverse-DNS bundle identifier (com.<studio>.fscord).
Acceptance criteria: Bundle ID agreed and recorded; reserved on both stores if possible.

Description: Install Unity 6 LTS via Hub and pin one exact patch version for the whole team.
Acceptance criteria: Agreed version documented in README; all machines on the same patch.

Description: New URP (mobile) project using the target folder structure from the roadmap (4.4).
Acceptance criteria: Project opens on the pinned version; folder structure in place; URP mobile renderer active.

Description: Add Input System, AI Navigation, Behavior, Addressables, UGS, LevelPlay, and Unity IAP.
Acceptance criteria: Packages resolve and compile; versions pinned in manifest.

Description: Set bundle ID, orientation, min SDK (Android) / iOS target, IL2CPP + ARM64, icons/splash placeholders.
Acceptance criteria: Android + iOS player settings correct; 64-bit only; builds locally.

Task: Set up signing in secret store
Description: Create Android keystore and iOS provisioning; store credentials in CI secrets, never in repo.
Acceptance criteria: Signed local build succeeds; no signing secret in source control.

Description: Pipeline builds signed Android + iOS artifacts from a commit (Unity Build Automation or GitHub Actions + Fastlane).
Acceptance criteria: Green CI run produces installable signed artifacts for both platforms.

Description: Install the empty URP build on a physical Android and iOS device.
Acceptance criteria: App launches and renders on both devices; cold-start recorded as baseline.

Description: Boot scene that initializes services in order and hands typed references to systems.
Acceptance criteria: Services initialize once at boot; no static-singleton sprawl; init order deterministic.

Description: Typed publish/subscribe system for gameplay events (e.g. TankDestroyed).
Acceptance criteria: Systems communicate via events; no GameObject.Find in new code; unit-tested.

Description: Generic pool for transient objects (shells, VFX, tanks, mines, floating text).
Acceptance criteria: Pooled spawn/return with no per-use allocation; capacity configurable; tested.

Description: Mode-agnostic ScriptableObject describing a match (spawns, waves, control points, objectives, win/lose).
Acceptance criteria: A match can be fully described as data; schema documented for designers.

Description: Runtime engine that plays any Match Definition and emits state events.
Acceptance criteria: Engine drives a match end-to-end from data; emits start/wave/win/lose events.

Description: State machine: Intro -> Playing -> WaveBreak -> Victory/Defeat.
Acceptance criteria: Match flow driven by the FSM; no boolean-flag state; transitions unit-tested.

Description: Input System + Enhanced Touch: tap, circle, swipe, X, drag, shake, pan/rotate/pinch -> intent events.
Acceptance criteria: All six weapon gestures + camera controls produce correct intent events; decoupled from effects.

Description: Additive scene load/unload via Addressables; retire Application.LoadLevel.
Acceptance criteria: Scenes load additively via Addressables; no deprecated load calls remain.

Description: Test scene wiring gestures -> pooled placeholder effects on the match engine.
Acceptance criteria: All gestures fire pooled effects; a data-defined match runs start to finish.

Description: Author HE, concentrated strike, napalm, daisy cutter, mines, nuke as data assets.
Acceptance criteria: Each weapon defined as data (damage, radius, cooldown, VFX refs); no hard-coded stats.

Description: Author Abrams, M60, T-55/62/72, Type-99 stat definitions.
Acceptance criteria: Units defined as data (HP, armor, speed, range, archetype); designer-editable.

Task: Author original levels as Match Definitions
Description: Recreate the four original levels as data-driven Match Definitions.
Acceptance criteria: Four levels selectable and playable from data.

Description: NavMeshSurface bake + agent-based tank movement.
Acceptance criteria: Tanks path correctly on baked navmesh; no legacy NavMesh API.

Task: Port decision logic to Behavior; retire RAIN
Description: Rebuild existing tank decisions in Unity Behavior graphs and remove RAIN DLLs.
Acceptance criteria: RAIN.dll removed; tanks behave at parity via Behavior graphs.

Description: Decoupled, event-driven control-point capture logic.
Acceptance criteria: Capture works via events; no cross-script Find; matches original behavior.

Description: Wave spawning system reading the Match Definition.
Acceptance criteria: Waves spawn per data; pooled; counts/timing match design.

Description: Reimplement FOW reveal and listening-post sightlines.
Acceptance criteria: FOW reveals around units/posts; performant on device.

Description: Replace TankSight: LOS-based target acquisition.
Acceptance criteria: Units acquire/hold targets by LOS at parity; no uncached lookups in hot path.

Description: Damage, armor, napalm burn-over-time, mine stop/damage, slow-mo concentrated strike.
Acceptance criteria: Combat math matches original; covered by unit tests.

Description: Rebuild HUD and menus driven by state events (no GameObject.Find wiring).
Acceptance criteria: UI updates from events; menu flow works; no Find-based wiring.

Description: Full playthrough of all four levels vs the 2015 beta.
Acceptance criteria: All four levels play at parity on device; sign-off recorded.

Description: Import preset: scale, LODs, colliders, ASTC compression; validate with a placeholder model.
Acceptance criteria: Placeholder model imports to spec; draw-call/memory sane; preset documented.

Description: Compression settings; streaming for music, decompress-on-load for short SFX.
Acceptance criteria: Placeholder audio imports per policy; mobile memory acceptable.

Description: Organize content into Addressable groups; set an initial build-size budget.
Acceptance criteria: Content grouped; build size measured against budget in CI.

Description: Versioned local save + UGS Cloud Save sync.
Acceptance criteria: Progress/settings persist across restart and sync across devices; migration-safe.

Description: Instrument session, match start/win/lose, weapon use events.
Acceptance criteria: Events appear in the analytics dashboard with correct params.

Description: Expose tuning values (ammo, damage, wave size) via Remote Config.
Acceptance criteria: Values fetched at boot and override defaults; safe fallback when offline.

Description: Interfaces/stubs for the Stage B mode framework and meta-progression.
Acceptance criteria: Interfaces exist and compile; a stub mode runs; documented for Stage B.

Description: Anonymous-first auth, upgradeable to platform accounts.
Acceptance criteria: Anonymous sign-in works; identity persists; upgrade path documented.

Description: Placeholder currency and catalog to validate the economy plumbing.
Acceptance criteria: Currency balance reads/writes; catalog resolves; no client-trusted balances.

Description: Secret management + dev/staging/prod environment configs.
Acceptance criteria: No secrets in source; environment switch works; prod locked down.

Description: Profiler + Memory Profiler on target hardware; fix allocations/hotspots.
Acceptance criteria: No steady-state per-frame allocations in combat; hotspots addressed.

Description: Ensure zero Instantiate/Destroy in combat hot paths.
Acceptance criteria: Combat spawns/returns via pools only; verified by profiler.

Description: Cache GetComponent references; remove Update-loop lookups.
Acceptance criteria: No per-frame GetComponent in hot paths; references cached on Awake.

Description: Set + enforce frame time, draw calls, memory, build size, cold start.
Acceptance criteria: CI fails when a budget is exceeded; budgets documented.

Description: Edit/play-mode tests for combat math and progression.
Acceptance criteria: Tests cover core math + progression; run green in CI.

Description: Per-scene smoke test in CI; enable Cloud Diagnostics.
Acceptance criteria: Each scene loads in CI; crashes reported with symbols.

Description: Verify the expansion-ready foundation checklist; go/no-go for Stage B spend.
Acceptance criteria: All gate criteria met and signed off; Stage B authorized.
